# The app's default layout (irregular quadrilateral + rect hole +
# three drive-lines) with both offset flags on. This is the closest
# fixture to image-1 territory; lots of interior wedges and bays.
# Use 90° stalls so divergence between skeleton-medial and
# offset-per-aisle is most visible.

polygon outer
76.30,0
692.14,0
782.80,654.85
168.78,654.85
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

polygon hole
394.53,251.80
611.14,251.80
613.91,512.33
394.53,512.33
----
hole: 4 vertices

drive-line
930.76,381.06
-42.60,512.33
----
drive-line: 930.76,381.06 -> -42.60,512.33

drive-line partitions
198.60,-53.66
475.79,349.25
----
drive-line: 198.60,-53.66 -> 475.79,349.25 partitions

drive-line partitions
446.56,335.61
930.76,135.52
----
drive-line: 446.56,335.61 -> 930.76,135.52 partitions

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

debug offset_carriers=true
----
debug offset_carriers=true

debug offset_carriers_interior=true
----
debug offset_carriers_interior=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 1039

snapshot
----
